body:
## Summary
- rewrite q146 generated true/false political-rights prompts as complete bilingual propositions instead of bare answer fragments
- mirror the q146 formatter in the validator and add focused regression coverage for derived, CSV, and static-site exports
- update the canonical CSV and static question-bank rows for the current q146 derived true/false IDs

## Verification
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test --test-name-pattern 'q146|political-rights|political ideas|politiska idéer' scripts/derived-content.test.js tests/content-published-question-types.test.js tests/content-question-sentence-endings.test.js tests/content-static-site-question-bank-parity.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-generated-true-false-naturalness --json`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `node scripts/export-site-question-bank.js --check`
- `git diff --check`
title: Rewrite political-rights generated true/false prompts
